water.name: Santa Ynez River and tributaries downstream from Bradbury Dam

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40(b)(99) — Santa Ynez River and tributaries downstream from Bradbury Dam (Santa Barbara Co.)
sources.quotedText: Santa Ynez River and tributaries downstream from Bradbury Dam (Santa Barbara Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: Santa Ynez River Restoration | California Trout
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 249134, "Santa Ynez River", Stream, CA, Santa Barbara Co.
sources.quotedText: GNIS has no dam-specific entry for Bradbury Dam in the current live layers (dams were removed from GNIS in 2021; the historical GNIS Feature ID 270130 remains on record via Wikidata); location corroborated via the Wikipedia/Wikidata infobox coordinates for Bradbury Dam (34.58278,-119.98056 / 34°34'58"N 119°58'50"W), anchored to the Santa Ynez River's own GNIS stream record (gaz_id 249134); correcting the file's prior coordinate (-120.2600,34.6200), which sat ~26km from the true dam location that bounds this reach.

parameters.note: Bradbury Dam (forming Lake Cachuma) blocks upstream passage for the endangered Southern California steelhead DPS; the river and all tributaries downstream of the dam are closed to all fishing to protect remaining steelhead.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year on the Santa Ynez River and tributaries downstream of Bradbury Dam
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license (not applicable here since the water is closed to all fishing, but included for completeness).

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+ (statewide baseline; this water is closed to fishing)
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
